pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.advertiseDesc: Reach broadcasters, production companies, and creative professionals across seven targeted placement zones throughout MediaLinkPro.
pricing.faq1q: Can I switch between monthly and annual billing?
pricing.faq1a: Yes, you can switch at any time from your billing settings. Annual billing activates immediately; prorated credits apply.
pricing.faq2q: What happens when I hit a plan limit (e.g. job posts)?
pricing.faq2a: You'll see an upgrade prompt. Your existing listings remain live.
pricing.faq3q: Do Individual and Organization plans stack?
pricing.faq3a: No. If you represent a company, purchase an Org plan under your company account. Personal Pro is for individual media professionals.
pricing.faq4a: All paid plans have a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
pricing.faq5a: Credits are added to your account monthly and can be used on any placement zone via the self-serve advertising dashboard. Unused credits expire at month end.
pricing.faq6q: How do I manage or cancel my subscription?
pricing.faq6a: Go to Settings → Billing. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time through the Stripe billing portal.
